vulns.title: JetBrains TeamCity Relative Path Traversal Vulnerability with public poc signal
vulns.summary: JetBrains TeamCity contains a relative path traversal vulnerability that could allow limited admin actions to be performed.
vulns.technicalSummary: The exploit path abuses a trust boundary in TeamCity: attacker-controlled input reaches rce handling that should require stricter validation, authentication, or state checks.
vulns.breakdown: The exploit path abuses a trust boundary in TeamCity: attacker-controlled input reaches rce handling that should require stricter validation, authentication, or state checks.
vulns.whatBroke: JetBrains TeamCity contains a relative path traversal vulnerability that could allow limited admin actions to be performed.
vulns.reality: Realistic when the affected product is exposed and unpatched. The updater only includes this because public tooling signal was found at Stuub/RCity-CVE-2024-27198.
vulns.exploitSyntax:
# authorized lab / owned targets only
git clone https://github.com/Stuub/RCity-CVE-2024-27198
cd RCity-CVE-2024-27198
python3 <script>.py --target https://<authorized-target>
# confirm exact flags in the linked GitHub README before validation
chains: internal pivot from an internet-facing control point
lateral movement if secrets or management access are recovered
vulns.weaponized: Likely worth tracking because public tooling exists and recent source activity was observed.

vulns.title: WebPros cPanel & WHM and WP2 (WordPress Squared) Missing Authentication for Critical.
vulns.summary: WebPros cPanel & WHM (WebHost Manager) and WP2 (WordPress Squared) contain an authentication bypass vulnerability in the login flow that allows unauthenticated remote attackers to gain unauthorized access to the control panel.
vulns.technicalSummary: The exploit path abuses a trust boundary in cPanel & WHM and WP2 (WordPress Squared): attacker-controlled input reaches auth bypass handling that should require stricter validation, authentication, or state checks.
vulns.breakdown: The exploit path abuses a trust boundary in cPanel & WHM and WP2 (WordPress Squared): attacker-controlled input reaches auth bypass handling that should require stricter validation, authentication, or state checks.

vulns.title: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS Out-of-bounds Write Vulnerability with public poc signal
vulns.summary: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS contains an out-of-bounds write vulnerability in the User-ID Authentication Portal (aka Captive Portal) service that can allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code with root privileges.
vulns.technicalSummary: A critical buffer overflow vulnerability has been identified in Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS in the User-ID captive portal functionality that could lead to remote code execution. Tracked as CVE-2026-0300 and rated CVSS 9.3, the flaw stems from improper.
vulns.breakdown: A critical buffer overflow vulnerability has been identified in Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS in the User-ID captive portal functionality that could lead to remote code execution. Tracked as CVE-2026-0300 and rated CVSS 9.3, the flaw stems from improper.
vulns.whatBroke: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS contains an out-of-bounds write vulnerability in the User-ID Authentication Portal (aka Captive Portal) service that can allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code with root privileges on the.
vulns.reality: Realistic when the affected product is exposed and unpatched. The updater only includes this because public tooling signal was found at bannned-bit/CVE-2026-0300-PANOS.

vulns.title: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Controller Authentication Bypass Vulnerability with public poc signal
vulns.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Controller & Manager contain an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated, remote attacker to bypass authentication and obtain administrative privileges on an affected system.
vulns.technicalSummary: The exploit path abuses a trust boundary in Catalyst SD-WAN: attacker-controlled input reaches auth bypass handling that should require stricter validation, authentication, or state checks.

vulns.title: Fortinet FortiWeb Path Traversal Vulnerability with public poc signal
